sources.title: Bessemer Cloud Index: Benchmarks by Stage

result.summary: Top-quartile SaaS companies at Series B stage ($5-15M ARR) show 80%+ gross margins, 120%+ net dollar retention, CAC payback under 18 months, and burn multiples below 1.5x, with the Rule of 40 re-emerging as the key efficiency metric for fundraising.
key_findings: Seed to Series A: median growth rate of 3x YoY, gross margins of 65-75%, with CAC payback period less relevant as investors prioritize product-market fit signals
Series B ($5-15M ARR): top quartile shows 100%+ YoY growth, 82% gross margins, 130% NDR, and LTV:CAC ratio of 5:1 with payback under 15 months
Series C+ ($15-50M ARR): growth expectations moderate to 60-80% YoY, but free cash flow margin becomes critical with top performers at -10% to +5% FCF margin
